features: Package Includes: You will receive 6 pieces of bow hair ties in 3 colors: black, red and white, 2 of each color. These bow scrunchies are perfect for daily wear or special occasions, which can meet your daily needs.

Quality Material: These bowknot hair ties are made of soft polyester fabric and elastic band, which are flexible and comfortable to touch, sturdy and wear-resistant, not easy to break. These elastic hair bands do not hurt your hair.
Suitable Size: These bow hair ropes have a good elasticity, which can be used on all different type of hairs ranging from curly, wavy, curly to straight hair and other hair textures as well.

Wide Application: These hair accessories are very easy to match your hat, bag, and clothes. These cute hair ties are suitable for daily wearings and different occasions like parties, ceremonies, travel, wedding, prom and so on.
Perfect Gift: Bow scrunchies for women are best gift for Birthday, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Anniversary, New Year's or any other holiday, very popular with women and young ladies.
description: Features: Our elastic hair bow for women could tie your hair while washing face and makeup and create your desired hairstyle, ponytail, twist braid, bun, half-do, braid, side ponytail. Our hair scrunchies with bow feature a trendy and sophisticated ribbon design, bow scrunchies for women adds femininity and romance to your hair. Specification: Material: Polyester Color: Black, White, Red Product Size: 11*10*4cm/4.33*3.93*1.57in Packing: Bag Packing Packing Size: 24*16*1.5cm Packing List: 2*Red Bow Scrunchies 2*Black Bow Scrunchies 2*White Bow Scrunchies
